positive: A whimsical and mystical creature, resembling a neon-glowing fox spirit, standing poised in a deep forest setting. The creature has dynamic, flowing energy trails and bioluminescent fur that shifts through shades of cyan, magenta, and electric blue. The composition is a symmetrical, central portrait emphasizing the silhouette against a contrasting, dark teal background. Intricate, swirling geometric patterns and celestial elements (like crescent moons and constellations) subtly frame the creature, giving it an ethereal, stained-glass aesthetic. High contrast, clean lines, vaporwave cyberpunk meets Japanese mythology illustration style. Perfect for apparel printing, crisp vector quality.
negative: blur, grain, noise, text, watermark, signature, low contrast, artifacts, ugly, poor anatomy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, bokeh, messy, photographic, realism
